headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Equal-Weight on Hasbro, Lowers Price Target to $85
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Anthony Bonadio   maintains Hasbro (NASDAQ:HAS) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $92 to $85.

raw.headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Equal-Weight on Hasbro, Lowers Price Target to $85

headline: Optimus Prime will take your call: Hasbro leans into AI-driven licensing
summary: The toy company’s AI studio, Sixth Wall, will debut behavioral licensing, which is focused on how characters think, speak and interact in new experiences.
